prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту, которая фильтрует JSONL-логи по уровню ERROR и сохраняет результат в новый JSONL-файл.
expected_steps: clarify JSONL input format and default log level
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define contract for input path, output path, selected level and skipped malformed lines
implement JSONL parser that skips malformed lines with a counter
write deterministic JSONL output for matching records
add fixture-based tests for filter and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: JSONL fixture is filtered by level
malformed JSON lines are skipped with count
all tests run from generated project root
